name: 比率
subject: math
domain_name: 比率与比例 / Ratios & Proportions / Ratios & Proportions
curriculum_points: 6.RP.1 Understand the concept of a ratio and use ratio language to describe a ratio relationship between two quantities.
6.RP.2 Understand the concept of a unit rate a/b associated with a ratio a:b with b ≠ 0, and use rate language in the context of a ratio relationship.
6.RP.3 Use ratio and rate reasoning to solve real-world and mathematical problems, e.g., by reasoning about tables of equivalent ratios, tape diagrams, double number line diagrams, or equations.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像
